vocab.meaning: thăng tiến trong nấc thang sự nghiệp
vocab.example: I am currently working as a junior analyst, but my ultimate goal is to climb the corporate ladder and reach a managerial position.

vocab.meaning: theo đuổi giáo dục bậc cao (đại học/cao học)
vocab.example: At the moment, I’m pursuing tertiary education in the field of Biotechnology to eventually enter the research industry.

vocab.meaning: công việc có thu nhập ổn định
vocab.example: After graduating last year, I’ve been in gainful employment at a local law firm.

vocab.meaning: sự khắt khe/áp lực trong học tập
vocab.example: Being a medical student involves a great deal of academic rigor, requiring me to devote most of my weekends to the library.

vocab.meaning: những rủi ro/khó khăn đặc thù của nghề nghiệp
vocab.example: Dealing with tight deadlines and high-pressure clients are just some of the occupational hazards I face in advertising.
My current degree uses an interdisciplinary approach, combining psychology with data science.

vocab.meaning: môi trường làm việc nhịp độ nhanh
vocab.example: Working in a startup is incredibly exciting because it’s a very fast-paced environment where no two days are the same.

vocab.meaning: sự tự chủ về tài chính
vocab.example: I decided to work while studying to achieve a degree of financial autonomy and reduce the burden on my parents.

vocab.meaning: quá trình học hỏi khó khăn ban đầu
vocab.example: As a fresh graduate in the IT sector, I’ve encountered a steep learning curve with the new software systems.
I believe that being a student is the best time to broaden one's horizons through internships and exchange programs.
